---
title: "applyTwitter"
author: "Xiaoxia Champon"
date: "4/30/2022"
output: pdf_document
---


```{r}
library(mgcv)
set.seed(6)
## simulate some data from a three class model
n <- 1000
f1 <- function(x) sin(3*pi*x)*exp(-x)
f2 <- function(x) x^3
f3 <- function(x) .5*exp(-x^2)-.2
f4 <- function(x) 1
x1 <- runif(n);x2 <- runif(n)
eta1 <- 2*(f1(x1) + f2(x2))-.5
eta2 <- 2*(f3(x1) + f4(x2))-1
p <- exp(cbind(0,eta1,eta2))
p <- p/rowSums(p) ## prob. of each category 
cp <- t(apply(p,1,cumsum)) ## cumulative prob.
## simulate multinomial response with these probabilities
## see also ?rmultinom
y <- apply(cp,1,function(x) min(which(x>runif(1))))-1
## plot simulated data...
plot(x1,x2,col=y+3)

## now fit the model...
b <- gam(list(y~s(x1)+s(x2),~s(x1)+s(x2)),family=multinom(K=2))
plot(b,pages=1)
gam.check(b)
```

```{r}
for (i in 1:100){
  print(i)
  fit_binom<-gam(list(W[,i]-1~s(tt)+s(tt),~s(tt)+s(tt)),family=multinom(K=2)) 
  
}

```

```{r}
fit_binom<-gam(list(W[,84]-1~s(tt)+s(tt),~s(tt)+s(tt)),family=multinom(K=2))
```

```{r}
gam.check(fit_binom)
```



```{r}
#load("twittertime.RData")
load("X_i1.RData")
load("X_i2.RData")
load("X_i3.RData")
```

```{r}
W_twitter=X_i1*1+X_i2*2+X_i3*3
save(W_twitter,file="W_twitter.RData")
```


```{r}
load("W_twitter.RData")
```


```{r}
twitter_one=sample(which(twitter_label$x==1),3)
twitter_two=sample(which(twitter_label$x==2),3)
twitter_three=sample(which(twitter_label$x==3),3)
sub_individual=c(twitter_one,twitter_two,twitter_three)
```

```{r}
sample(which(twitter_label$x==3),3)
```


```{r}
which(twitter_label$x==1)
```


```{r}
which(twitter_label$x==2)
```



```{r}
sub_individual
```

```{r}
sub_individual_new=c(1, 2, 3, 11, 24, 25, 3680,  3702,3815)
```

```{r}
which(W_twitter[sub_individual[9],]==3)
```

```{r}
which(W_twitter[sub_individual[8],]==3)
```

```{r}
which(W_twitter[sub_individual[7],]==3)
```

```{r}
which(W_twitter[3766,]==3)
```




```{r}
which(W_twitter[3815,]==3)
```

```{r}
which(W_twitter[3702,]==3)
```

```{r}
which(W_twitter[3680,]==3)
```





```{r}
twitter_label=read.csv("twitter_3875_clusterlabel.csv")
```

```{r}
twitter_one=sample(which(twitter_label$x==1),3)
twitter_two=sample(which(twitter_label$x==2),3)
twitter_three=sample(which(twitter_label$x==3),3)
```


```{r}
library(cfda)
twitter_time=t
twitter_id=1:length(twitter_label$x)
```

```{r}
twitter_data_frame_cfda= data.frame(matrix(nrow = length(twitter_id)*length(twitter_time), ncol = 3))
twitter_data_frame_cfda$id=rep(twitter_id,each=length(twitter_time))
twitter_data_frame_cfda$time=rep(twitter_time,length(twitter_id))
twitter_data_frame_cfda$state=c(t(W_twitter))
twitter_data_frame_cfda=twitter_data_frame_cfda[,4:6]
save(twitter_data_frame_cfda,file="twitter_data_frame_cfda.RData")
```


```{r}
started_time=Sys.time()
started_time
Tmax_all=max(twitter_data_frame_cfda$time)
 cfda_cut_all=cut_data(twitter_data_frame_cfda, Tmax = Tmax_all)
  m_basis <- 10
  b_basis <- create.bspline.basis(c(0, Tmax_all), nbasis = m_basis, norder = 4)
  twitter_cfda_results <- compute_optimal_encoding(cfda_cut_all, b_basis, nCores = 9, verbose = FALSE)
  twitter_cfda_results$runTime
  #9558.135.   9558.135/60=159.3
```



```{r}
sub_individual=c(twitter_one,twitter_two,twitter_three)
```

```{r}
load("twitter_data_frame_cfda.RData")
```


```{r}
load("twittertime.RData")
```

```{r}
sub_individual_new=c(1, 2, 3, 11, 99, 431, 3680,  3702,3815)
```



```{r}
#550
#700
#900
#1050
#1500
##150 cluster 3
##350 cluster 2
time_index=1800
twitter_time_subset=twitter_time[time_index:(time_index+100)]
twitter_data_frame_cfda_subset=twitter_data_frame_cfda[(twitter_data_frame_cfda$id %in% sub_individual_new) ,]
twitter_data_frame_cfda_subset$state[twitter_data_frame_cfda_subset$state==1]="No Tweet"
twitter_data_frame_cfda_subset$state[twitter_data_frame_cfda_subset$state==2]="Tweet Non-Ref Brand"
twitter_data_frame_cfda_subset$state[twitter_data_frame_cfda_subset$state==3]="Tweet on Ref Brand"
twitter_fig=twitter_data_frame_cfda_subset[twitter_data_frame_cfda_subset$time<max(twitter_time_subset)& twitter_data_frame_cfda_subset$time>min(twitter_time_subset),]
Tmax=max(twitter_fig$time)
twittercut <- cut_data(twitter_fig, Tmax = Tmax)
plotData(twittercut)+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20))  +
  theme(legend.position="bottom")+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(0.88,0.91), labels=c('March 11, 2017', 'March 12, 2017'))


```

#change id to 1-9
```{r}

twittercut_new_id=twittercut
twittercut_new_id$id[twittercut_new_id$id==11]=4
twittercut_new_id$id[twittercut_new_id$id==99]=5
twittercut_new_id$id[twittercut_new_id$id==431]=6
twittercut_new_id$id[twittercut_new_id$id==3680]=7
twittercut_new_id$id[twittercut_new_id$id==3702]=8
twittercut_new_id$id[twittercut_new_id$id==3815]=9

plotData(twittercut_new_id)+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20))  +
  theme(legend.position="bottom")+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(0.88,0.91), labels=c('March 11, 2017', 'March 12, 2017'))


```


##15 minuetes to check the sensitivity
```{r}
X_i1_15min=read.csv(file='15min_no_tweet_dataset.csv')[,-1]   #3875, 2162  to 1000,2161  1st col originally the id X
X_i2_15min=read.csv(file='15mn_no_mentions_dataset.csv')[,-1]  
X_i3_15min=read.csv(file='15min_mentions_dataset.csv')[,-1]
timet_15min=colnames(X_i1_15min)
timetnew_15min=gsub("X","",timet_15min)
timetnewn_15min=gsub('\\.', '-', timetnew_15min)
time1_15min=stringi::stri_replace_last_regex(timetnewn_15min,'-',':')
time2_15min=stringi::stri_replace_last_regex(time1_15min,'-',':')
time3_15min=stringi::stri_replace_last_regex(time2_15min,'-',' ')
startendt_15min=time3_15min[c(1,length(time3_15min))] # "2017-02-14 03:00:00" "2017-03-16 03:00:00"
time4_15min=as.numeric(as.POSIXct(strptime(time3_15min,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")))
which(is.na(time4_15min)) #1870 1871 1872. #2492 2493 2494 2495
time4_15min[c(2492, 2493, 2494, 2495)]=as.numeric(as.POSIXct(c("2017-03-12 02:00:00", "2017-03-12 02:20:00" ,"2017-03-12 02:40:00"),"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S",tz="EST"))
time5_15min=time4_15min-min(time4_15min)
timefinal_15min=time5_15min/max(time5_15min)
t_15min=timefinal_15min[101:2100]
st_15min=t_15min[1]
et_15min=tail(t_15min,n=1)
datapoints_15min=length(t_15min)
X_i1_15m=X_i1_15min[101:2100]
X_i2_15m=X_i2_15min[101:2100]
X_i3_15m=X_i3_15min[101:2100]
colnames(X_i1_15m)=t_15min
colnames(X_i2_15m)=t_15min
colnames(X_i3_15m)=t_15min

save(X_i1,file="X_i1t_15min.RData")
save(X_i2,file="X_i2t_15min.RData")
save(X_i3,file="X_i3t_15min.RData")
save(t_15min,st_15min,et_15min,file="twittertime_15min.RData")
```



#pre processing

```{r}
# X_i1r=read.csv(file='dataset2notweets.csv')[1:1000,-1]   #3875, 2162  to 1000,2161  1st col originally the id X
# X_i2r=read.csv(file='dataset0tweetnomention.csv')[1:1000,-1]  
# X_i3r=read.csv(file='dataset1mention.csv')[1:1000,-1]
```


```{r}
X_i1r=read.csv(file='/Users/xzhao17/Documents/GitHub/xc_cj_clustering_cfd/R/submission_code/no_tweet_dataset.csv')[,-1]   #3875, 2162  to 1000,2161  1st col originally the id X
X_i2r=read.csv(file='/Users/xzhao17/Documents/GitHub/xc_cj_clustering_cfd/R/submission_code/no_mentions_dataset.csv')[,-1]  
X_i3r=read.csv(file='/Users/xzhao17/Documents/GitHub/xc_cj_clustering_cfd/R/submission_code/mentions_dataset.csv')[,-1]
timet=colnames(X_i1r)
timetnew=gsub("X","",timet)
timetnewn=gsub('\\.', '-', timetnew)
time1=stringi::stri_replace_last_regex(timetnewn,'-',':')
time2=stringi::stri_replace_last_regex(time1,'-',':')
time3=stringi::stri_replace_last_regex(time2,'-',' ')
startendt=time3[c(1,length(time3))] # "2017-02-14 03:00:00" "2017-03-16 03:00:00"
time4=na.omit(as.numeric(as.POSIXct(strptime(time3,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"))))
```


```{r}
# which(is.na(time4)) #1870 1871 1872. #17350 17351 17352
# time4[c(1870,1871,1872)]=as.numeric(as.POSIXct(c("2017-03-12 02:00:00", "2017-03-12 02:20:00" ,"2017-03-12 02:40:00"),"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S",tz="EST"))
time5=time4-min(time4)
timefinal=time5/max(time5)
#t=timefinal[101:2100]
t=timefinal[101:2116]

save(t,file="time_stamp.RData")

st=t[1]
et=tail(t,n=1)
datapoints=length(t)
# X_i1=X_i1r[101:2100]
# X_i2=X_i2r[101:2100]
# X_i3=X_i3r[101:2100]
X_i116=X_i1r[101:2116]
X_i216=X_i2r[101:2116]
X_i316=X_i3r[101:2116]
colnames(X_i116)=t
# colnames(X_i2)=t
# colnames(X_i3)=t

# save(X_i1,file="X_i1.RData")
# save(X_i2,file="X_i2.RData")
# save(X_i3,file="X_i3.RData")
# save(t,st,et,file="twittertime.RData")

save(X_i116,file="X_i116.RData")
save(X_i216,file="X_i216.RData")
save(X_i316,file="X_i316.RData")
save(t,st,et,file="twittertime2016.RData")

# startt=Sys.time()
load("X_i1.RData")
load("X_i2.RData")
load("X_i3.RData")
#############################

#01_functions
###############################


library(xtable)
library(fda)
library(refund)
library(Matrix)
library(MASS)
library(arm)
library(mgcv)
library(readr)
library(funData)
library(MFPCA)
# library(purrr)
library(tidyverse)
library(gridExtra)
# library(knitr)
# library(kableExtra)
library(dbscan)
library(cfda)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)


############################################################################
#function to to generate and simulate data
##########################################################################




#Function to return the logit
logit <- function(x){
  return(log(x/(1-x)))
}

#####
#Function: wrapper function for gam() which outputs the fitted values
#
#Inputs: 
# z : index z = 1,...,N 
# Curves : N x D matrix of observed binary series
# tt : grid of timepoints going from 0 to 1 with D observations
# k : number of basis functions
# method: method used to evaluate the gam
#
#Output: 
# Fitted values from the game function for subject z 
#
#####
#get smoothed curves
regression_g = function(z, Curves, tt, k=25, method="ML"){   #changed from 10 to 25
  z1 = Curves[z,]
  gam1 <- gam(z1~s(tt, bs = "cr", m=2, k = k),
              family="binomial", method = method,control=list(maxit = 500,mgcv.tol=1e-4,epsilon = 1e-04),optimizer=c("outer","bfgs"))
  return(gam1$fitted.values)
}

probc=function(Curves_train,tt){
  N_train=dim(as.matrix(Curves_train))[1]
  vec = matrix(1:(N_train), ncol = 1)
  smoothed_p = t(apply(vec, 1, function(x) regression_g(x, as.matrix(Curves_train), tt)))
  smoothed_p
}


#adjust to ML 4/6/2022
# regression_g = function(z, tt, k=25, method="ML"){
#   gam1 <- gam(z~s(tt, bs = "cr", m=2, k = k), 
#               family="binomial", method = method,control=list(maxit = 500,mgcv.tol=1e-4,epsilon = 1e-04),optimizer=c("outer","bfgs"))
#   return(gam1$fitted.values)
# }




######################################################################################################################
#original before 4/6/2022
##
#Step 1 of the proposed method in Anthony paper one: smoothing using link function
##

#New function to output predicted L-1 latent curves:
#input observed X_i1 or X_i2 binary curves and return smoothed Z_i1hat, Z_i2hat
Z_ihat=function(Curves_train,tt){
  N_train=dim(Curves_train)[1]
  vec = matrix(1:(N_train), ncol = 1)
  smoothed_x = logit(t(apply(vec, 1, function(x) regression_g(x, Curves_train, tt))))
  smoothed_x
}
########################################################################################################################

#####################################################################################################
# 4//6/ 2022
##
#Step 1 of the proposed method in Anthony paper one: smoothing using link function
##

#New function to output predicted L latent probability curves:
#input observed X_i1 or X_i2 binary curves and return smoothed p_i1hat, p_i2hat


#########################################################################################################





#n number of subjects
#datapoints
#sparse=1 yes   sparse=0 no
#scorevar=2 bigger var , scorevar=1 smaller var
#ps=1 find z1,z2,z3, find p1,p2,p3, logp1-logp3
#ps=2 find z1,z2,z3, find p1,p2,p3=1-p1-p2 logp1-logp3
#ps=3 find z1,z2 staicu find z1hat z2hat
#ps=4 find z1,z2 staicu find z1hat z2hat but only use numerator
#k  #number of eigen functions
#q  #level of the categorical level
datapoints=dim(X_i1)[2]
n=dim(X_i1)[1]
st=as.numeric(colnames(X_i1))[1]
et=tail(as.numeric(colnames(X_i1)),n=1)
t=as.numeric(colnames(X_i1))
get_estimate_latent=function(X_i1,X_i2,X_i3,ps,k){
  
  k=k
  
  #k=3  #number of eigen functions
  q=3  #level of the categorical level
  # n=10 #number of subjects
  
  
  #collect value and graph
  #collect first two rows of observed binary curves
  # X_i1=t(X_i[1,,])  #all n row subjects , t columns values related to p1
  # X_i2=t(X_i[2,,]) #all n row subjects , t columns values related to p2
  # X_i3=t(X_i[3,,]) #all n row subjects , t columns values related to p3
  
  #recover Z_i1 hat using X_i[1,all j, all n] only related to p1
  Z_i1hat=Z_ihat(X_i1,t)
  #recover Z_i2 hat using X_i[2,all j, all n] only related to p2 
  Z_i2hat=Z_ihat(X_i2,t)
  Z_i3hat=Z_ihat(X_i3,t)
  
  
  # Z_i1hatstar=log(exp(Z_i1hat))+log(1+exp(Z_i3hat))-log(1+exp(Z_i1hat))-log(exp(Z_i3hat))
  # Z_i2hatstar=log(exp(Z_i2hat))+log(1+exp(Z_i3hat))-log(1+exp(Z_i2hat))-log(exp(Z_i3hat))
  
  
  # common_check=1-exp(Z_i1hat+Z_i2hat)-exp(Z_i2hat)
  # common_check[common_check<=0]=0.001
  # 
  # 
  # 
  # Z_i1hatstar=Z_i1hat-log(common_check)
  # Z_i2hatstar=Z_i2hat+log(1+exp(Z_i1hat))-log(common_check)
  if(ps==1){ 
    # smooth_p1=(1+exp(-Z_i1hat))^(-1)
    # smooth_p2=(1+exp(-Z_i2hat))^(-1)
    # smooth_p3=(1+exp(-Z_i3hat))^(-1)
    # Z_i1hatstar=log(smooth_p1)-log(smooth_p3)
    # Z_i2hatstar=log(smooth_p2)-log(smooth_p3)
    
    
    Z_i1hatstar=Z_i1hat+log(1+exp(Z_i3hat))-log(1+exp(Z_i1hat))-Z_i3hat
    Z_i2hatstar=Z_i2hat+log(1+exp(Z_i3hat))-log(1+exp(Z_i2hat))-Z_i3hat
  }
  
  

  
  p_i1hat=p_ihat(Z_i1hatstar,Z_i2hatstar)$p_1hatmatrix
  p_i2hat=p_ihat(Z_i1hatstar,Z_i2hatstar)$p_2hatmatrix
  p_i3hat=p_ihat(Z_i1hatstar,Z_i2hatstar)$p_3hatmatrix
  
  
  # 
  # #plot and compare
  # par(mfrow=c(1,3))
  # matplot(t(p_i1[1:ns,]),col="green")  #true Z_i1 for first subject
  # matlines(t(p_i1hat[1:ns,]),col="red")
  # 
  # matplot(t(p_i2[1:ns,]),col="green")  #true Z_i1 for first subject
  # matlines(t(p_i2hat[1:ns,]),col="red")
  # 
  # matplot(t(p_i3[1:ns,]),col="green")  #true Z_i1 for first subject
  # matlines(t(p_i3hat[1:ns,]),col="red")
  # truel=list("TrueX1"=X_i1,"TrueX2"=X_i2,"TrueX3"=X_i3,"TrueZ_i1"=Z_i1,"TrueZ_i2"=Z_i2,"Truep_i1"=p_i1,"Truep_i2"=p_i2,"Truep_i3"=p_i3,"Truescore_matrix"=score_matrix,"Truecatcurve"=X_nt)
  truel=list("Truecatcurve"=X_nt)
  est=list("EstimateZ_i1"=Z_i1hatstar,"EstimateZ_i2"=Z_i2hatstar,"Estimatep_i1"=p_i1hat,"Estimatep_i2"=p_i2hat,"Estimatep_i3"=p_i3hat)
  return(list("Trueth"=truel,"Est"=est))
}




# MFPCA_result
baysglm_result=function(datagenerated,M,datapoints,q=3,n,st,et,t){
  datapoints=datapoints
  # t=seq(from = st,to = et, length=datapoints)
  t=t
  st=st
  et=et
  #collect True Z_is, p_is and estimated latent curves Z_ihat, p_ihat
  #return(list(truevalues, estvalues))
  # Z_i1_truth=truevalues$TrueZ_i1
  # Z_i2_truth=truevalues$TrueZ_i2
  #################################################################
  # Z_i1_est=estvalues$EstimateZ_i1
  # Z_i2_est=estvalues$EstimateZ_i2
  ###############################################################
  # p_i1_truth=truevalues$Truep_i1
  # p_i2_truth=truevalues$Truep_i2
  # p_i3_truth=truevalues$Truep_i3
  ##########################################################################
  # p_i1_est=estvalues$Estimatep_i1
  # p_i2_est=estvalues$Estimatep_i2
  # p_i3_est=estvalues$Estimatep_i3
  ###########################################################################
  
  # Z_i1=datagenerated$Trueth$TrueZ_i1
  # Z_i2=datagenerated$Trueth$TrueZ_i2
  Z_i1hatstar=datagenerated$Est$EstimateZ_i1
  Z_i2hatstar=datagenerated$Est$EstimateZ_i2
  
  
  # p_i1=datagenerated$Trueth$Truep_i1
  # p_i2=datagenerated$Trueth$Truep_i2
  # p_i3=datagenerated$Trueth$Truep_i3
  p_i1hat=datagenerated$Est$Estimatep_i1
  p_i2hat=datagenerated$Est$Estimatep_i2
  p_i3hat=datagenerated$Est$Estimatep_i3
  
  
  
  # categorical_curve=truevalues$Truecatcurve  #dim:n=200 subjects, col=t 500 points
  #step 2: MFPCA
  # Z_ihat muldata
  m1=funData(argvals = list(t), X = Z_i1hatstar) #20*500
  m2=funData(argvals = list(t), X = Z_i2hatstar) 
  
  # p_ihat muldata
  # m1p=funData(argvals = list(t), X = p_i1hat) #20*500
  # m2p=funData(argvals = list(t), X = p_i2hat)
  # m3p=funData(argvals = list(t), X = p_i3hat)
  # 
  mvdata=multiFunData(list(m1,m2))
  # mvdatap=multiFunData(list(m1p,m2p,m3p))
  
  
  # if(sparse==1){
  #   M=7
  # }
  # 
  # 
  # if(sparse==0){
  #   M=5
  # }
  # 
  M=M
  
  # MFPCA based on univariate FPCA Z_ihat
  uFPCA <- MFPCA(mvdata, M = M, uniExpansions = list(list(type = "uFPCA"),
                                                     list(type = "uFPCA")))
  
  
  
  # MFPCA based on univariate FPCA p_ihat
  # uFPCAp <- MFPCA(mvdatap, M = M, uniExpansions = list(list(type = "uFPCA"),
  #                                                      list(type = "uFPCA"),list(type = "uFPCA")))
  # 
  # MFPCA_results_Z=list("meanfnZ"=uFPCA$meanFunction,"eigenfnZ"=uFPCA$functions,"eigenvalueZ"=uFPCA$values,"scoresZ"=uFPCA$scores)
  
  
  
  # MFPCA_results_p=list("meanfnp"=uFPCAp$meanFunction,"eigenfnp"=uFPCAp$functions,"eigenvaluep"=uFPCAp$values,"scoresp"=uFPCAp$scores)
  # no need for scores
  MFPCA_results_Z=list("meanfnZ"=uFPCA$meanFunction,"eigenvalueZ"=uFPCA$values)
  # 
  # MFPCA_results_p=list("meanfnp"=uFPCAp$meanFunction,"eigenvaluep"=uFPCAp$values)
  # 
  
  #MFPCA estimate
  # Z_i1hatpca=apply(t(uFPCA$functions[[1]]@X)%*%t(uFPCA$scores),2,function(x) c(uFPCA$meanFunction[[1]]@X)+x)  #500*20
  # Z_i2hatpca=apply(t(uFPCA$functions[[2]]@X)%*%t(uFPCA$scores),2,function(x) c(uFPCA$meanFunction[[2]]@X)+x)
  
  # pcap_i1hat=apply(t(uFPCAp$functions[[1]]@X)%*%t(uFPCAp$scores),2,function(x) c(uFPCAp$meanFunction[[1]]@X)+x)
  # 
  # 
  # pcap_i2hat=apply(t(uFPCAp$functions[[2]]@X)%*%t(uFPCAp$scores),2,function(x) c(uFPCAp$meanFunction[[2]]@X)+x)
  # 
  # pcap_i3hat=apply(t(uFPCAp$functions[[3]]@X)%*%t(uFPCAp$scores),2,function(x) c(uFPCAp$meanFunction[[3]]@X)+x)
  
  # MFPCAest=list("Z_i1hat"=Z_i1hatpca,"Z_i2hat"=Z_i2hatpca,"p_i1hat"=pcap_i1hat,"p_i2hat"=pcap_i2hat,"p_i3hat"=pcap_i3hat)
  
  # MFPCAest=list("Z_i1hat"=Z_i1hatpca,"Z_i2hat"=Z_i2hatpca)
  
  
  
  ##use bayesian to find scores can't allocate vector size 6.7Gb
  #bayesian scores for pi curves
  ###################################################################################################################
  #first need to combine multivariate data to one big matrix
  #MU1+mu2
  # muhatp=c(c(uFPCAp$meanFunction[[1]]@X),c(uFPCAp$meanFunction[[2]]@X),c(uFPCAp$meanFunction[[3]]@X))
  # #eigenvalues=uFPCA$values/500
  # eigenvaluesp=uFPCAp$values
  # #eigenfunctions=(rbind(t(uFPCA$functions[[1]]@X),t(uFPCA$functions[[2]]@X),t(uFPCA$functions[[3]]@X)))*sqrt(500)
  # eigenfunctionsp=(rbind(t(uFPCAp$functions[[1]]@X),t(uFPCAp$functions[[2]]@X),t(uFPCAp$functions[[3]]@X)))
  # #smoothed probability curves instead of binary curves
  # Curves_trainp=cbind(p_i1hat,p_i2hat,p_i1hat)
  # q=q
  # MFPCAdimp=q  #how many probabilities or how many categories

  # 
  # #bayesian scores for Zi curves
  # #first need to combine multivariate data to one big matrix
  # #MU1+mu2
  muhatz=c(c(uFPCA$meanFunction[[1]]@X),c(uFPCA$meanFunction[[2]]@X))
  #eigenvalues=uFPCA$values/500
  eigenvaluesz=uFPCA$values
  #eigenfunctions=(rbind(t(uFPCA$functions[[1]]@X),t(uFPCA$functions[[2]]@X),t(uFPCA$functions[[3]]@X)))*sqrt(500)
  eigenfunctionsz=(rbind(t(uFPCA$functions[[1]]@X),t(uFPCA$functions[[2]]@X)))
  #smoothed Z curves instead of binary curves
  # Curves_trainz=cbind(log(smooth_p1)-log(smooth_p3),log(smooth_p2)-log(smooth_p3))
  
  Curves_trainz=cbind( Z_i1hatstar, Z_i2hatstar)
  MFPCAdimz=q-1  #how many latent Z_i curves, or category-1
  
  
  
  
  
  #####
  #Function: wrapper function for bayesglm() which outputs expected coefficients for the gaussian responses
  #
  #Inputs: 
  # z : index z = 1,...,N 
  # dta : data frame contain the subject id, mean function, eigenfunctions and observe binary values
  # lm_structure: formula displaying the bayesglm function
  # eigen_vals1: eigen_values for the psi coefficients
  #
  #Output: 
  # Fitted values from the game function for subject z 
  #
  #####
  # regression_bf2 = function(z, dta, lm_structure, eigen_vals1){
  #   bayesglm1 = bayesglm(lm_structure,
  #                        # family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  #                        family=gaussian,
  #                        data = subset(dta, dta$id==z),
  #                        prior.scale = sqrt(eigen_vals1), #set scales
  #                        prior.df = Inf, #normal priors
  #                        scaled = F ) #Do not adjust the scales
  #   return(bayesglm1$coefficients)
  # }
  
  
  ##########################################################################################################
  
  #write a function to produce the bayesian scores
  #input muhat: column combined long  column of all multivariate MFPCA mean functions
  #eigenvalues: MFPCA eigen values
  #eigenfunctions: row combined long row of all multivariate MFPCA eigen functions
  #Curves_train: column combined curves row is subject, column is time point
  #not binary but smoothed curves after first step (either smoothed Z or p)
  #dimention of the MFPCA (critical for how many times to repeat each individual when expand data to long format)
  #output bayesian subject specific scores (row is the number of subjects, column is the dimention of # eigen functions)
  #############################################################################################################
  # bayesian_scores=function(muhat,eigenvalues,eigenfunctions,Curves_train, MFPCAdim,n=n){
  #   ##
  #   #STEP 3:
  #   # Set up and apply Bayesglm framework
  #   ##
  #   fit = list(mu = muhat,
  #              evalues = eigenvalues,
  #              efunctions = eigenfunctions)
  # 
  #   mu_t_hat = fit$mu
  #   eigen_vals1 = fit$evalues
  #   eigen_funcs1 = fit$efunctions
  # 
  #   #data frame used in bayesglm
  #   tt=t
  #   N_train=n  #number of subjects
  #   D=datapoints  #number of time points
  #   dta = data.frame(index = rep(tt, N_train*MFPCAdim),
  #                    value = c(t(Curves_train)),
  #                    id = rep(1:N_train, each = D*MFPCAdim))
  # 
  #   npc = length(eigen_vals1)
  #   if(npc>1){
  #     for (z in 1:npc) {
  #       dta <- cbind(dta, rep(eigen_funcs1[,z], N_train*MFPCAdim))
  #     }
  #   }else{
  #     dta = cbind(dta, matrix(eigen_funcs1, ncol =1))
  #   }
  # 
  #   #assign names to data frame
  #   names(dta)[4:(4 + npc - 1)] <- c(paste0("ksi", 1:npc))
  #   #repeat mean function in data frame once per user
  #   dta$mu = rep(mu_t_hat , N_train)
  # 
  #   #get formula for glm
  #   glm_structure = paste(paste0("ksi", 1:npc), collapse = "+")
  #   glm_structure = paste("value ~ -1 + offset(mu) +" , glm_structure , sep="")
  #   #set scale for the glm
  #   prior_scales_test = eigen_vals1
  # 
  #   #Estimate the Scores for the training set
  #   vec = matrix(1:N_train, ncol = 1)
  #   scores_train = t(apply(vec, 1, function(x) regression_bf2(x, dta, glm_structure, prior_scales_test)))
  #   return(scores_train)
  # 
  # }
  n=n
  st=st
  et=et
  t=t
  # scores_p=bayesian_scores(muhatp,eigenvaluesp,eigenfunctionsp,Curves_trainp, MFPCAdimp)
  scores_z=bayesian_scores(muhatz,eigenvaluesz,eigenfunctionsz,Curves_trainz, MFPCAdimz,datapoints=datapoints,n=n,st=st,et=et,t)
  # bayesianscores=list("baypscores"=scores_p,"bayzscores"=scores_z)
  # scores_p=bayesian_scores(muhatp,eigenvaluesp,eigenfunctionsp,Curves_trainp, MFPCAdimp,datapoints=datapoints,n=n,st=st,et=et)
  # # 
  pcaZ_i1hat=apply(t(uFPCA$functions[[1]]@X)%*%t(scores_z),2,function(x) c(uFPCA$meanFunction[[1]]@X)+x)  #500*20
  pcaZ_i2hat=apply(t(uFPCA$functions[[2]]@X)%*%t(scores_z),2,function(x) c(uFPCA$meanFunction[[2]]@X)+x)
  # 
  # pcap_i1hatscore=apply(t(uFPCAp$functions[[1]]@X)%*%t(scores_p),2,function(x) c(uFPCAp$meanFunction[[1]]@X)+x)  #500*20
  # pcap_i2hatscore=apply(t(uFPCAp$functions[[2]]@X)%*%t(scores_p),2,function(x) c(uFPCAp$meanFunction[[2]]@X)+x)
  # pcap_i3hatscore=apply(t(uFPCAp$functions[[3]]@X)%*%t(scores_p),2,function(x) c(uFPCAp$meanFunction[[3]]@X)+x)
  # # 
  # #Bayesian estimate
  BayEstimate=list("BaypcaZ_i1"=pcaZ_i1hat,"BaypcaZ_i2"=pcaZ_i2hat)
  # 
  
  # return(list("Truth"=truevalues,"Smoothed"=estvalues,"MFPCAZ"=MFPCA_results_Z,"MFPCAp"=MFPCA_results_p,"Bayesian_scores"=bayesianscores,"MFPCAestimate"=MFPCAest,"BayesianEst"=BayEstimate))
  #if no need for MFPCA scores and estimate
  # return(list("MFPCAZ"=MFPCA_results_Z,"MFPCAp"=MFPCA_results_p,"Bayesian_scores"=bayesianscores,"BayesianEst"=BayEstimate))
  #can't allocate vector size 6.7G whe using baysglm
  
  # return(list("MFPCAZ"=MFPCA_results_Z,"MFPCAestimate"=MFPCAest))
  return(list("MFPCAZ"=MFPCA_results_Z,"Bayesian_scores"=scores_z,"BayesianEst"=BayEstimate))
  
}

#step1
#get_estimate_latent=function(X_i1,X_i2,X_i3,ps,k)
trueest=get_estimate_latent(X_i1,X_i2,X_i3,1,3)
#MFPCA
#baysglm_result=function(datagenerated,M,datapoints,q=3,n,st,et,t)
MFPCAr=baysglm_result(trueest,3,datapoints,q=3,n,st,et,t)

endt=Sys.time()
time_elapse=endt-startt
time_elapse
```

```{r}
X_i1rfall=read.csv('no_tweet_dataset.csv')
```




##all users
```{r}
```


```{r}
X_i1rf=read.csv('/Users/xzhao17/Documents/project1mac/no_tweet_dataset.csv')[,-1]   #3875, 2162  to 1000,2161  1st col originally the id X
X_i2rf=read.csv('/Users/xzhao17/Documents/project1mac/no_mentions_dataset.csv')[,-1]  
X_i3rf=read.csv('/Users/xzhao17/Documents/project1mac/mentions_dataset.csv')[,-1]
#timet=colnames(X_i1rf)
timet=colnames(X_i2rf)
timetnew=gsub("X","",timet)
timetnewn=gsub('\\.', '-', timetnew)
time1=stringi::stri_replace_last_regex(timetnewn,'-',':')
time2=stringi::stri_replace_last_regex(time1,'-',':')
time3=stringi::stri_replace_last_regex(time2,'-',' ')
startendt=time3[c(1,length(time3))] # "2017-02-14 03:00:00" "2017-03-16 03:00:00"
time4=na.omit(as.numeric(as.POSIXct(strptime(time3,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"))))
# which(is.na(time4)) #1870 1871 1872
# time4[c(1870,1871,1872)]=as.numeric(as.POSIXct(c("2017-03-12 02:00:00", "2017-03-12 02:20:00" ,"2017-03-12 02:40:00"),"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S",tz="EST"))
time5=time4-min(time4)
timefinal=time5/max(time5)
t=timefinal[101:2116]
st=t[1]
et=tail(t,n=1)
datapoints=length(t)
X_i1f2016=X_i1rf[101:2116]
X_i2f2016=X_i2rf[101:2116]
X_i3f2016=X_i3rf[101:2116]
colnames(X_i1f2016)=t
# colnames(X_i2f)=t
# colnames(X_i3f)=t

save(X_i1f2016,file="X_i1full2016.RData")
save(X_i2f2016,file="X_i2full2016.RData")
save(X_i3f2016,file="X_i3full2016.RData")
```


```{r}
# startt=Sys.time()
load("X_i1full.RData")
load("X_i2full.RData")
load("X_i3full.RData")
```




```{r}
library(fda)
library(refund)
library(Matrix)
library(MASS)
library(arm)
library(mgcv)
# library(readr)
library(funData)
library(MFPCA)
# library(purrr)
library(tidyverse)
library(gridExtra)
# library(knitr)
# library(kableExtra)
 library(dbscan)
# library(cfda)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(FADPclust)
```


```{r}

#Function to return the logit
logit <- function(x){
  return(log(x/(1-x)))
}

#####
#Function: wrapper function for gam() which outputs the fitted values
#
#Inputs: 
# z : index z = 1,...,N 
# Curves : N x D matrix of observed binary series
# tt : grid of timepoints going from 0 to 1 with D observations
# k : number of basis functions
# method: method used to evaluate the gam
#
#Output: 
# Fitted values from the game function for subject z 
#
#####
#get smoothed curves
regression_g = function(z, Curves, tt, k=25, method="ML"){   #changed from 10 to 25
  z1 = Curves[z,]
  gam1 <- gam(z1~s(tt, bs = "cr", m=2, k = k),
              family="binomial", method = method,control=list(maxit = 500,mgcv.tol=1e-4,epsilon = 1e-04),optimizer=c("outer","bfgs"))
  return(gam1$fitted.values)
}


######################################################################################################################
#original before 4/6/2022
##
#Step 1 of the proposed method in Anthony paper one: smoothing using link function
##

#New function to output predicted L-1 latent curves:
#input observed X_i1 or X_i2 binary curves and return smoothed Z_i1hat, Z_i2hat
Z_ihat=function(Curves_train,tt){
  N_train=dim(as.matrix(Curves_train))[1]
  vec = matrix(1:(N_train), ncol = 1)
  smoothed_x = logit(t(apply(vec, 1, function(x) regression_g(x, as.matrix(Curves_train), tt))))
  smoothed_x
}

probc=function(Curves_train,tt){
  N_train=dim(as.matrix(Curves_train))[1]
  vec = matrix(1:(N_train), ncol = 1)
  smoothed_p = t(apply(vec, 1, function(x) regression_g(x, as.matrix(Curves_train), tt)))
  smoothed_p
}

p_ihat=function(Z_i1app,Z_i2app){
  denom=(1+exp(Z_i1app)+exp(Z_i2app))
  p_i1h=exp(Z_i1app)/denom
  p_i2h=exp(Z_i2app)/denom
  p_i3h=1/denom
  # p_i3h=1-p_i1h- p_i2h
  return(list("p_1hatmatrix"=p_i1h,"p_2hatmatrix"=p_i2h,"p_3hatmatrix"=p_i3h))
}
########################################################################################################################

#####################################################################################################
# 4//6/ 2022
##
#Step 1 of the proposed method in Anthony paper one: smoothing using link function
##

#New function to output predicted L latent probability curves:
#input observed X_i1 or X_i2 binary curves and return smoothed p_i1hat, p_i2hat


#########################################################################################################





#n number of subjects
#datapoints
#sparse=1 yes   sparse=0 no
#scorevar=2 bigger var , scorevar=1 smaller var
#ps=1 find z1,z2,z3, find p1,p2,p3, logp1-logp3
#ps=2 find z1,z2,z3, find p1,p2,p3=1-p1-p2 logp1-logp3
#ps=3 find z1,z2 staicu find z1hat z2hat
#ps=4 find z1,z2 staicu find z1hat z2hat but only use numerator
#k  #number of eigen functions
#q  #level of the categorical level
# datapoints=dim(X_i1)[2]
# n=dim(X_i1)[1]

datapoints=dim(X_i1f)[2]
n=dim(X_i1f)[1]
# st=as.numeric(colnames(X_i1))[1]
st=as.numeric(colnames(X_i1f))[1]
# et=tail(as.numeric(colnames(X_i1)),n=1)
et=tail(as.numeric(colnames(X_i1f)),n=1)
t=as.numeric(colnames(X_i1f))
get_estimate_latent=function(X_i1,X_i2,X_i3,ps,k,t){
  
  k=k
  
  #k=3  #number of eigen functions
  q=3  #level of the categorical level
  # n=10 #number of subjects
  
  
  #collect value and graph
  #collect first two rows of observed binary curves
  # X_i1=t(X_i[1,,])  #all n row subjects , t columns values related to p1
  # X_i2=t(X_i[2,,]) #all n row subjects , t columns values related to p2
  # X_i3=t(X_i[3,,]) #all n row subjects , t columns values related to p3
  ################################
  # #recover Z_i1 hat using Z_i[1,all j, all n] only related to p1
  # Z_i1hat=Z_ihat(X_i1,t)
  # #recover Z_i2 hat using X_i[2,all j, all n] only related to p2
  # Z_i2hat=Z_ihat(X_i2,t)
  # Z_i3hat=Z_ihat(X_i3,t)
  ##############################
  
  # #recover Z_i1 hat using Z_i[1,all j, all n] only related to p1. n*t
  p1hat=probc(X_i1,t)
  #recover Z_i2 hat using X_i[2,all j, all n] only related to p2
  p2hat=probc(X_i2,t)
  p3hat=probc(X_i3,t)
  
  
  # Z_i1hatstar=log(exp(Z_i1hat))+log(1+exp(Z_i3hat))-log(1+exp(Z_i1hat))-log(exp(Z_i3hat))
  # Z_i2hatstar=log(exp(Z_i2hat))+log(1+exp(Z_i3hat))-log(1+exp(Z_i2hat))-log(exp(Z_i3hat))
  
  
  # common_check=1-exp(Z_i1hat+Z_i2hat)-exp(Z_i2hat)
  # common_check[common_check<=0]=0.001
  # 
  # 
  # 
  # Z_i1hatstar=Z_i1hat-log(common_check)
  # Z_i2hatstar=Z_i2hat+log(1+exp(Z_i1hat))-log(common_check)
  if(ps==1){ 
    # smooth_p1=(1+exp(-Z_i1hat))^(-1)
    # smooth_p2=(1+exp(-Z_i2hat))^(-1)
    # smooth_p3=(1+exp(-Z_i3hat))^(-1)
    # Z_i1hatstar=log(smooth_p1)-log(smooth_p3)
    # Z_i2hatstar=log(smooth_p2)-log(smooth_p3)
    
# 
#     Z_i1hatstar=Z_i1hat+log(1+exp(Z_i3hat))-log(1+exp(Z_i1hat))-Z_i3hat
#     Z_i2hatstar=Z_i2hat+log(1+exp(Z_i3hat))-log(1+exp(Z_i2hat))-Z_i3hat
    # 
    # eps=0.0001
    #  Z_i1hatstar=log(p1hat+eps)-log(p3hat+eps)
    # Z_i2hatstar=log(p2hat+eps)-log(p3hat+eps)
    
    Z_i1hatstar=log(p1hat)-log(p3hat)
    Z_i2hatstar=log(p2hat)-log(p3hat)
    
    
  }
  


  # p_i1hat=p_ihat(Z_i1hatstar,Z_i2hatstar)$p_1hatmatrix
  # p_i2hat=p_ihat(Z_i1hatstar,Z_i2hatstar)$p_2hatmatrix
  # p_i3hat=p_ihat(Z_i1hatstar,Z_i2hatstar)$p_3hatmatrix
  
  
 p_i1hat=p1hat
  p_i2hat=p2hat
  p_i3hat=p3hat
  

  
  # truel=list("Truecatcurve"=X_nt)
  est=list("EstimateZ_i1"=Z_i1hatstar,"EstimateZ_i2"=Z_i2hatstar,"Estimatep_i1"=p_i1hat,"Estimatep_i2"=p_i2hat,"Estimatep_i3"=p_i3hat)
  # return(list("Trueth"=truel,"Est"=est))
  return(list("Est"=est))
}



##ramsay
baysglm_resultram=function(datagenerated,M,datapoints,q=3,n,st,et,t){
  datapoints=datapoints
  # t=seq(from = st,to = et, length=datapoints)
  t=t
  st=st
  et=et
  Z_i1hatstar=datagenerated$Est$EstimateZ_i1
  Z_i2hatstar=datagenerated$Est$EstimateZ_i2
  n=dim(Z_i1hatstar)[1]
  Zihatstar=array(c(Z_i1hatstar, Z_i2hatstar), c(n,datapoints,2))

  fdarange = c(st, et)
  fdabasis = fda::create.bspline.basis(fdarange, 25, 4)
  fdatime = seq(st, et, length = datapoints)
  Zihatstarnew = apply(Zihatstar, c(1, 3), t)
  fdafd = fda::smooth.basis(fdatime, Zihatstarnew, fdabasis)$fd
  nharm = M
  fdapcaList = fda::pca.fd(fdafd, nharm)
  
  finalM=which(cumsum(fdapcaList$values)/sum(fdapcaList$values)>=0.95)[1]
  fdapcaListfinal = fda::pca.fd(fdafd, finalM)
  scores_z = apply(fdapcaListfinal$scores, c(1, 2), sum)
  values=fdapcaListfinal$values
  meanfn=fdapcaList$meanfd
  eigenfn=fdapcaList$harmonics
  
  dims=dim(scores_z)[2]
  if (dims<2){
    #finalM=which(cumsum(fdapcaList$values)/sum(fdapcaList$values)>=0.98)[1]
    finalM=2
    fdapcaListfinal = fda::pca.fd(fdafd, finalM)
    scores_z = apply(fdapcaListfinal$scores, c(1, 2), sum)
    values=fdapcaListfinal$values
    meanfn=fdapcaList$meanfd
    eigenfn=fdapcaList$harmonics
  }
  
  ##############FADP cluster
   Zihatone= Z_i1hatstar
  Zihattwo= Z_i2hatstar
  
  fdarange = c(st, et)
  fdabasis = fda::create.bspline.basis(fdarange, 25, 4)
  fdatime = seq(st, et, length = datapoints)
  fdafd1 = fda::smooth.basis(fdatime, t(Zihatone), fdabasis)$fd
  fdafd2 = fda::smooth.basis(fdatime, t(Zihattwo), fdabasis)$fd
  FADlist=list(fdafd1,fdafd2)
  FADP <- FADPclust(fdata = FADlist, cluster = 2:5, method = "FADP1",
                    proportion = seq(0.02, 0.2, 0.02), f.cut = 0.15,
                    pve = 0.9, stats = "Avg.silhouette")
  FADPcluster=FADP$clust
  
  ##################
  
  
  
  return(list("scores"=scores_z,
              "latentcurve"=Zihatstar,"eigenvalue"=values,"meanfn"=meanfn,
              "eigenfn"=eigenfn,"FADPcluster"=FADPcluster))
}

```



```{r}
st=Sys.time()
trueestf=get_estimate_latent(as.matrix(X_i1f),as.matrix(X_i2f),as.matrix(X_i3f),1,3,t)
#trueestffadp=get_estimate_latent(as.matrix(X_i1f),as.matrix(X_i2f),as.matrix(X_i3f),1,3,t)
et=Sys.time()
et-st
#Time difference of 17.44965 mins
#Time difference of 12.04516 hours
```

```{r}
save(trueestf,file="trueestf.RData")
```





```{r}
st=Sys.time()
#mfpcaramffadp=baysglm_resultram(trueestf,2,2000,q=3,3875,t[1],t[2000],seq(t[1],t[2000],length=2000))
mfpcaramffadp=baysglm_resultram(trueestffadp,2,2000,q=3,3875,t[1],t[2000],seq(t[1],t[2000],length=2000))
#save(trueestf,mfpcaramf,file="Twitterramfinalfinal.RData")
save(trueestffadp,mfpcaramffadp,file="Twitterramfadp.RData")
et=Sys.time()
et-st
#Time difference of 38.07698 mins
```


```{r}
load("/Users/xzhao17/Documents/project1mac/Twitterramfadp.RData")
#check scores
scores_3875=mfpcaramffadp$scores
plot(scores_3875[,1],scores_3875[,2])
```
```{r}
#FADPcluster results
fadpcluster=mfpcaramffadp$FADPcluster
table(fadpcluster)
```

#graph by clusters FADP and DBSCAN
```{r}
#plotbycluster
plot_latentfn_ylim=function(zlatent,phat,st,et,cluster,labelnum,argval,tclusterdata){
  vectort=c(which(tclusterdata$Cluster==labelnum))
  datapoints=dim(zlatent)[2]
  
  n=length(vectort)
  ########################################################################################
  
  #plot 1: truth and smoothed
  ########################################################################################
  #entire block is  n*t dimension
  #truth Z, P and smoothed Z, P
  numz=dim(zlatent)[3]
  nump=dim(phat)[3]
  zest=zlatent[vectort,,]
  pest=phat[vectort,,]
  
  #Z_i
  #meanz=colMeans(zest)   #t*numz
  # meanz=zmean
  #meanfnZ[[1]]@X
  meanz=colMeans(zest)
  
  ###########################################################################################
  if (labelnum==0){
      for (i in 1:numz){
    matplot(argval, t(zest[,,i]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c())
    lines(argval,meanz[,i] ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","5","10","15","20")) }
  #p_i
  
  meanp=colMeans(pest)   #t*nump
  
  for (i in 1:nump){
    matplot(argval, t(pest[,,i]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('p')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('p')[i]))
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab='',cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n")
    
    lines(argval,meanp[,i] ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,
         at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","5","10","15","20"))
     #legend(x = "topright",          # Position
            
    #legend = c("Individual", "Mean"),  # Legend texts
            #lty = c(1, 2),           # Line types
           #col = c("grey", "red"),           # Line colors
           #lwd = 2)                 # Line width
  }
  }
  
  #################set ylim

  
  }


```





```{r}
load("/Users/xzhao17/Downloads/project1mac/Twitterramf.RData")
```

```{r}
load("/Users/xzhao17/Downloads/project1mac/Twitterramfpeps.RData")
```


```{r}
#baysglm_result=function(datagenerated,M,datapoints,q=3,n,st,et,t)
mfpcahapf=baysglm_result(trueestf,3,2000,q=3,3875,0.1,0.9,t)
save(trueestf,mfpcahapf,file="Twitterhapf.RData")
```

```{r}
load("/Users/xzhao17/Documents/project1mac/Twitterhapf.RData")
```



```{r}
#combinedscore_z=mfpcaramf$scores
combinedscore_z=scores_3875 #2D array you want to cluster
#combinedscore_z=mfpcahapf$MFPCAZ$scoresZ
dimz=dim(combinedscore_z)[2] #find how many features data has
if (dimz<=2){minPts=4} #this is what user defined. if you could automatically find a good one.that might solve all my problem. nOW I use default value from literature minPts=4 for 2 features and 2*features+1 for data has more than 2 features
if (dimz>2){minPts=2*dimz+1}
library(dbscan)
library(fossil)
#devtools::install_github("ahasverus/elbow")
library(elbow) #this library automatically select best epsilon
library(pdfCluster)
dist=kNNdist(combinedscore_z, k =minPts-1) #step 1 sort the distance. input 2D array you want to cluster, and then minPts-1
#ninty5p=quantile(dist, probs = pct)
scaleep=12.84  #this set to be 1, that is the scale you multiple the optimal epsilon, I set it to 12.84 just because of my twitter data is very noisy. this is the how much you want to multiple the optimal radius. increase the circle basically. instead of the optimal epsilon circle. I increase the circle so my cluster is meaingful otherwise if smalla circle, too many clusters are created
#########change to max increase
distdataelbow=data.frame(sort(dist)) #sort the distance
distdataelbow$index=1:(dim(combinedscore_z)[1])
ipoint <- elbow(data = distdataelbow)
epsoptimal=(ipoint$sort.dist._selected)*scaleep #these three lines find the elbow 
#epsoptimal=sortdist[which.max(diff(sortdist))]

##############################

#res <- dbscan(combinedscore_z, eps =ninty5p , minPts = minPts) minPts = 5
res <- dbscan(combinedscore_z, eps =epsoptimal , minPts = 25) #then use epsilon, minPts to cluster

#res <- dbscan(combinedscore_z, eps =ninty5p, minPts = 5)
table(res$cluster)


```



```{r}
tclusterdata=data.frame(combinedscore_z)
tclusterdata$Cluster=as.factor(res$cluster)
library(ggplot2)
tps <- ggplot(tclusterdata,aes(X1,X2,colour = Cluster)) + geom_point(aes(shape=Cluster),size=3)+ggtitle(paste0("Twitter Users Cluster Results",'\n',"(",dim(tclusterdata)[1]," Subjects",")")) +
  #xlab(expression('Score '* widehat(xi[i1]))) + ylab(expression('Score '* widehat(xi[i2])))
  xlab('MFPCA Score1 ') + ylab('MFPCA Score2 ')+ theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+#theme(text = element_text(size = 20))+
  #theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 30))  
  #theme(axis.text=element_text(size = 20),axis.title = element_text(size =30))
  theme(text=element_text(size = 20))+theme(legend.position = c(0.92,0.8))
tps

```

```{r}
write.csv(res$cluster,file="twitter_3875_clusterlabel.csv")
```



#kemeans twitter all
```{r}
 reskmeansall = NbClust::NbClust(data =  combinedscore_z, diss = NULL,
                               distance = "euclidean", min.nc = 2, max.nc = 5,
                               method = "kmeans",index="silhouette")
tclusterdataall=data.frame(combinedscore_z)
tclusterdataall$Cluster=as.factor(reskmeansall$Best.partition)

library(ggplot2)
tpsall <- ggplot(tclusterdataall,aes(X1,X2,colour = Cluster)) + geom_point(aes(shape=Cluster),size=3)+ggtitle(paste0("K-means Cluster Results",'\n',"(",dim(tclusterdataall)[1]," Subjects",")")) +
  #xlab(expression('Score '* widehat(xi[i1]))) + ylab(expression('Score '* widehat(xi[i2])))
  xlab('MFPCA Score1 ') + ylab('MFPCA Score2 ')+ theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+#theme(text = element_text(size = 20))+
  #theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 30))  
  #theme(axis.text=element_text(size = 20),axis.title = element_text(size =30))
  theme(text=element_text(size = 20))
tpsall
```

```{r}
table(reskmeansall$Best.partition)
```




#without spike4
```{r}
library(dbscan)
resnospike <- dbscan(combinedscore_z[-spiksub,], eps =epsoptimal , minPts = 25)

tclusterdatanospke=data.frame(combinedscore_z[-spiksub,])
tclusterdatanospke$Cluster=as.factor(resnospike$cluster)
library(ggplot2)
tpsnospike <- ggplot(tclusterdatanospke,aes(X1,X2,colour = Cluster)) + geom_point(aes(shape=Cluster),size=3)+ggtitle(paste0("Twitter Users Cluster Results",'\n',"(",dim(tclusterdatanospke)[1]," Subjects",")")) +
  #xlab(expression('Score '* widehat(xi[i1]))) + ylab(expression('Score '* widehat(xi[i2])))
  xlab('MFPCA Score1 ') + ylab('MFPCA Score2 ')+ theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+#theme(text = element_text(size = 20))+
  #theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 30))  
  #theme(axis.text=element_text(size = 20),axis.title = element_text(size =30))
  theme(text=element_text(size = 20))+theme(legend.position = c(0.92,0.8))
tpsnospike
```
```{r}
table(resnospike$cluster)
```





```{r}
vec0=c(which(tclusterdata$Cluster==0))
vec1=c(which(tclusterdata$Cluster==1))
vec2=c(which(tclusterdata$Cluster==2))
vec3=c(which(tclusterdata$Cluster==3))
```


#vec0
```{r}
par(mfrow=c(2,2))
argval=t
meanz=colMeans(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1[vec0,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1[vec0,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,10))
    lines(argval,meanz ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 

    meanz2=colMeans(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2[vec0,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2[vec0,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(-6,8))
    lines(argval,meanz2 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
    
#######################################
    par(mfrow=c(2,3))
meanp=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1[vec0,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1[vec0,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 

    meanp2=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2[vec0,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2[vec0,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp2 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
    
    
      meanp3=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec0,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec0,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp3 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
```

#vec1
```{r}
par(mfrow=c(2,2))
argval=t
meanz=colMeans(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1[vec1,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1[vec1,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,10))
    lines(argval,meanz ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 

    meanz2=colMeans(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2[vec1,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2[vec1,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(-6,8))
    lines(argval,meanz2 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
    
#######################################
    par(mfrow=c(2,3))
meanp=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1[vec1,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1[vec1,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 

    meanp2=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2[vec1,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2[vec1,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp2 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
    
    
      meanp3=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec1,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec1,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp3 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
```









#vec2
```{r}
par(mfrow=c(2,2))
argval=t
meanz=colMeans(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1[vec2,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1[vec2,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,10))
    lines(argval,meanz ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 

    meanz2=colMeans(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2[vec2,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2[vec2,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(-6,8))
    lines(argval,meanz2 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
    
#######################################
    par(mfrow=c(2,3))
meanp=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1[vec2,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1[vec2,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 

    meanp2=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2[vec2,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2[vec2,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp2 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
    
    
      meanp3=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec2,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec2,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp3 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
```


#vec3
```{r}
par(mfrow=c(2,2))
argval=t
meanz=colMeans(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1[vec3,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1[vec3,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,10))
    lines(argval,meanz ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 

    meanz2=colMeans(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2[vec3,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2[vec3,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(-6,8))
    lines(argval,meanz2 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
    
#######################################
    par(mfrow=c(2,3))
meanp=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1[vec3,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1[vec3,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 

    meanp2=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2[vec3,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2[vec3,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp2 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
    
    
      meanp3=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec3,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec3,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp3 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
```

#plot 4 rows and 5 columns cex 1.5

```{r}
par(mfrow=c(4,5))
##vec1
meanz=colMeans(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1[vec1,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1[vec1,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            # cex.lab=1.5, cex.axis=2,lty=1, lwd=3,ylim=c(-12,3),main=expression(hat("Z")^2*(t)),cex.main=2
            
            main=expression(hat("Z")^1*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,10))
    lines(argval,meanz ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 

    meanz2=colMeans(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2[vec1,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2[vec1,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=expression(hat("Z")^2*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(-6,8))
    lines(argval,meanz2 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
    
#######################################

meanp=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1[vec1,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1[vec1,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=expression(hat("p")^1*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 

    meanp2=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2[vec1,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2[vec1,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=expression(hat("p")^2*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp2 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
    
    
      meanp3=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec1,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec1,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=expression(hat("p")^3*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp3 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
##vec2
argval=t
meanz=colMeans(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1[vec2,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1[vec2,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=expression(hat("Z")^1*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,10))
    lines(argval,meanz ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 

    meanz2=colMeans(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2[vec2,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2[vec2,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=expression(hat("Z")^2*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(-6,8))
    lines(argval,meanz2 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
    
#######################################

meanp=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1[vec2,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1[vec2,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=expression(hat("p")^1*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 

    meanp2=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2[vec2,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2[vec2,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=expression(hat("p")^2*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp2 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
    
    
      meanp3=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec2,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec2,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=expression(hat("p")^3*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp3 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
#vec3
meanz=colMeans(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1[vec3,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1[vec3,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=expression(hat("Z")^1*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,10))
    lines(argval,meanz ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 

    meanz2=colMeans(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2[vec3,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2[vec3,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=expression(hat("Z")^2*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(-6,8))
    lines(argval,meanz2 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
    
#######################################
meanp=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1[vec3,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1[vec3,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=expression(hat("p")^1*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 

    meanp2=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2[vec3,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2[vec3,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=expression(hat("p")^2*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp2 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
    
    
      meanp3=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec3,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec3,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=expression(hat("p")^3*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp3 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
#vec0
meanz=colMeans(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1[vec0,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1[vec0,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=expression(hat("Z")^1*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,10))
    lines(argval,meanz ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 

    meanz2=colMeans(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2[vec0,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2[vec0,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
  # cex.lab=1.5, cex.axis=2,lty=1, lwd=3,ylim=c(-12,3),main=expression(hat("Z")^2*(t)),cex.main=2          main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day",main=expression(hat("Z")^2*(t)), ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(-6,8))
    lines(argval,meanz2 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
    
#######################################
meanp=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1[vec0,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1[vec0,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=expression(hat("p")^1*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 

    meanp2=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2[vec0,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2[vec0,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=expression(hat("p")^2*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp2 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
    
    
      meanp3=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec0,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec0,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=expression(hat("p")^3*(t)),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    lines(argval,meanp3 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
```

#just p3 for all clusters #cex.lab=1.5
```{r}
par(mfrow=c(3,4))
#cluster 1, cluster 2, cluster 3, noise 
#vec1
 meanp3=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec1,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec1,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
           
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,0.01),main="Cluster One")
    lines(argval,meanp3 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
#vec2
     meanp3=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec2,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec2,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
           
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,0.3),main="Cluster Two")
    lines(argval,meanp3 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
  #vec3
     meanp3=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec3,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec3,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
           
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,0.3),main="Cluster Three")
    lines(argval,meanp3 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30"))
  #vec0
 meanp3=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec0,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec0,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main="Noise Group",
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,0.3))
    lines(argval,meanp3 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
```



#just p3 for all clusters #cex.lab=2
```{r}
par(mfrow=c(1,4))
#cluster 1, cluster 2, cluster 3, noise 
#vec1
 meanp3=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec1,])
```
