```{r}
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec1,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
           
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,0.01),main="Cluster One")
    lines(argval,meanp3 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
#vec2
     meanp3=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec2,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec2,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
           
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,0.3),main="Cluster Two")
    lines(argval,meanp3 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
  #vec3
     meanp3=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec3,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec3,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
           
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,0.3),main="Cluster Three")
    lines(argval,meanp3 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30"))
  #vec0
 meanp3=colMeans(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec0,])
 matplot(t, t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec0,]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main="Noise Group",
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,0.3))
    lines(argval,meanp3 ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
```




```{r}
vec1fadp=c(which(fadpcluster==1))
vec2fadp=c(which(fadpcluster==2))
```





```{r}
#plotbycluster
plot_latentfn=function(zlatent,phat,st,et,cluster,labelnum,argval,tclusterdata){
  vectort=c(which(tclusterdata$Cluster==labelnum))
  datapoints=dim(zlatent)[2]
  
  n=length(vectort)
  ########################################################################################
  
  #plot 1: truth and smoothed
  ########################################################################################
  #entire block is  n*t dimension
  #truth Z, P and smoothed Z, P
  numz=dim(zlatent)[3]
  nump=dim(phat)[3]
  zest=zlatent[vectort,,]
  pest=phat[vectort,,]
  
  #Z_i
  #meanz=colMeans(zest)   #t*numz
  # meanz=zmean
  #meanfnZ[[1]]@X
  meanz=colMeans(zest)
  for (i in 1:numz){
    
        matplot(argval, t(zest[,,i]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n")
    lines(argval,meanz[,i] ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","5","10","15","20")) 
    
    
  
   
    
    
    
    }
  #p_i
  
  meanp=colMeans(pest)   #t*nump
  
  for (i in 1:nump){
    matplot(argval, t(pest[,,i]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('p')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('p')[i]))
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab='',cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
    
    lines(argval,meanp[,i] ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,
         at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","5","10","15","20"))
     #legend(x = "topright",          # Position
            
    #legend = c("Individual", "Mean"),  # Legend texts
            #lty = c(1, 2),           # Line types
           #col = c("grey", "red"),           # Line colors
           #lwd = 2)                 # Line width
  }
  
  }



```


```{r}
zlatentf=array(c(t(mfpcahapf$MFPCAZ$z1),t(mfpcahapf$MFPCAZ$z2)),dim=c(3875,2000,2))
phatf=array(c(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1,trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2,trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3),
           dim=c(3875,2000,3))

```


```{r}
zlatentf=array(c(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1,trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2),dim=c(3875,2000,2))
phatf=array(c(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1,trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2,trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3),
           dim=c(3875,2000,3))
```



```{r}
plot_latentfn(zlatentf,phatf,
              0,1,tclusterdata$Cluster,0,t,tclusterdata)
```


```{r}
length(vec1)
```

```{r}
c(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec1,])[2203763]
```

```{r}
as.vector(which(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec1,]==c(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec1,])[2203763],arr.ind=TRUE))
```












```{r}
matplot(t,t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec0,]),ylab="Value",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2, xlab="Day",xaxt="n")
 axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
```

```{r}
for (i in 1:length(vec0)){
  matplot(t,trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec0[i],],ylim=c(0,1))
}
```
```{r}
par(mfrow=c(2,2))
matplot(t,trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec0[11],],ylim=c(0,1),ylab="Value",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2, xlab="Day",xaxt="n",main=paste0("Third Probability Curve for subject ",vec0[11]))
axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
```

#vec2: subject 2309, subject 2721

```{r}
vec3
```

```{r}

```

```{r}
 matplot(t,trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2[2309,],ylim=c(0,1))
```

```{r}
for (i in 1:length(vec3)){
  matplot(t,trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2[vec3[i],],ylim=c(0,1))
}
```

```{r}
spiksub=c(2467,2309,2721,287)
```




```{r}
unlist(c(unname(X_i3f[spiksub[1],])))
```
```{r}
unlist(c(unname(X_i3f[spiksub[1],1000:2000])))
```





```{r}
par(mfrow=c(2,2))
matplot(t,t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1[spiksub,]),col=c("black","red","green","blue"),ylim=c(0,10), xlab="Day", ylab='',cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",main="First Latent Curves")
axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
matplot(t,t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2[spiksub,]),col=c("black","red","green","blue"),ylim=c(-5,8), xlab="Day", ylab='',cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",main="Second Latent Curves")
axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         #at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),
         at = c(0,400/2000,800/2000,1200/2000,1600/2000,2000/2000),
         cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","6","12","18","24","30")) 
#legend("topright", inset=c(-0.2,0), legend=c(paste0("Sub",spiksub)),col=c("black","red","green","blue"), title="Subjects")
```

```{r}
#table(unlist(c(unname(X_i1f[spiksub[1],1:10]))))
#2467,2309,2721
paste0("subject",spiksub[1])
table(unlist(c(unname(X_i1f[spiksub[1],]))))
table(unlist(c(unname(X_i2f[spiksub[1],]))))
table(unlist(c(unname(X_i3f[spiksub[1],]))))

paste0("subject",spiksub[2])
table(unlist(c(unname(X_i1f[spiksub[2],]))))
table(unlist(c(unname(X_i2f[spiksub[2],]))))
table(unlist(c(unname(X_i3f[spiksub[2],]))))

paste0("subject",spiksub[3])
table(unlist(c(unname(X_i1f[spiksub[3],]))))
table(unlist(c(unname(X_i2f[spiksub[3],]))))
table(unlist(c(unname(X_i3f[spiksub[3],]))))
```

```{r}
paste0("subject",spiksub[4])
table(unlist(c(unname(X_i1f[spiksub[4],]))))
table(unlist(c(unname(X_i2f[spiksub[4],]))))
table(unlist(c(unname(X_i3f[spiksub[4],]))))
```





```{r}
table(unlist(c(unname(X_i1f))))
```

```{r}
table(unlist(c(unname(X_i2f))))
```



```{r}
table(unlist(c(unname(X_i3f))))
```





```{r}
matplot(t,t(trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3[vec0,]),type='l', lty=1,
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('p')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('p')[i]))
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab='',cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n",ylim=c(0,1))
 axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","5","10","15","20")) 
    
```




```{r}
17*2000
```



```{r}
plot_latentfn(zlatentf,phatf,
              0,1,tclusterdata$Cluster,1,t,tclusterdata)

```


```{r}
plot_latentfn(zlatentf,phatf,
              0,1,tclusterdata$Cluster,2,t,tclusterdata)
```


```{r}
plot_latentfn(zlatentf,phatf,
              0,1,tclusterdata$Cluster,3,t,tclusterdata)
```


```{r}
plot_latentfn_fadp(zlatentf,phatf,
              0,1,fadpcluster,1,t,fadpcluster)
```

```{r}

```




```{r}
plot_latentfn_fadp(zlatentf,phatf,
              0,1,fadpcluster,2,t,fadpcluster)
```




```{r}
plot_latentfn_fadp=function(zlatent,phat,st,et,cluster,labelnum,argval,fadpcluster){
  vectort=c(which(fadpcluster==labelnum))
  datapoints=dim(zlatent)[2]
  
  
  n=length(vectort)
  ########################################################################################
  
  #plot 1: truth and smoothed
  ########################################################################################
  #entire block is  n*t dimension
  #truth Z, P and smoothed Z, P
  numz=dim(zlatent)[3]
  nump=dim(phat)[3]
  zest=zlatent[vectort,,]
  pest=phat[vectort,,]
  
  #Z_i
  #meanz=colMeans(zest)   #t*numz
  # meanz=zmean
  #meanfnZ[[1]]@X
  meanz=colMeans(zest)
  for (i in 1:numz){
    matplot(argval, t(zest[,,i]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('Z')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('Z')[i]))
            
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab="",cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n")
    lines(argval,meanz[,i] ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,                         # Define x-axis manually
         at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","5","10","15","20")) }
  #p_i
  
  meanp=colMeans(pest)   #t*nump
  
  for (i in 1:nump){
    matplot(argval, t(pest[,,i]),
            type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
            #main=mtext(bquote("Estimated Latent Cruve "*widehat('p')[i])),
            #xlab="Number of Datapoints", ylab=expression(widehat('p')[i]))
            main=mtext(bquote(" ")),
            xlab="Day", ylab='',cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,xaxt="n")
    
    lines(argval,meanp[,i] ,
          type='l', lty=2, lwd=2, col = "red")
    axis(1,
         at = c(0,476/2000,952/2000,1428/2000,1904/2000),cex.lab = 2,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2,
         labels = c("0","5","10","15","20"))
     #legend(x = "topright",          # Position
            
    #legend = c("Individual", "Mean"),  # Legend texts
            #lty = c(1, 2),           # Line types
           #col = c("grey", "red"),           # Line colors
           #lwd = 2)                 # Line width
  }
  
  }



```
#15 minutes

```{r}
Z_ihat=function(Curves_train,tt){
  N_train=dim(as.matrix(Curves_train))[1]
  vec = matrix(1:(N_train), ncol = 1)
  smoothed_x = logit(t(apply(vec, 1, function(x) regression_g(x, as.matrix(Curves_train), tt))))
  smoothed_x
}

probc=function(Curves_train,tt){
  N_train=dim(as.matrix(Curves_train))[1]
  vec = matrix(1:(N_train), ncol = 1)
  smoothed_p = t(apply(vec, 1, function(x) regression_g(x, as.matrix(Curves_train), tt)))
  smoothed_p
}

p_ihat=function(Z_i1app,Z_i2app){
  denom=(1+exp(Z_i1app)+exp(Z_i2app))
  p_i1h=exp(Z_i1app)/denom
  p_i2h=exp(Z_i2app)/denom
  p_i3h=1/denom
  # p_i3h=1-p_i1h- p_i2h
  return(list("p_1hatmatrix"=p_i1h,"p_2hatmatrix"=p_i2h,"p_3hatmatrix"=p_i3h))
}
########################################################################################################################

#####################################################################################################
# 4//6/ 2022
##
#Step 1 of the proposed method in Anthony paper one: smoothing using link function
##

#New function to output predicted L latent probability curves:
#input observed X_i1 or X_i2 binary curves and return smoothed p_i1hat, p_i2hat


#########################################################################################################





#n number of subjects
#datapoints
#sparse=1 yes   sparse=0 no
#scorevar=2 bigger var , scorevar=1 smaller var
#ps=1 find z1,z2,z3, find p1,p2,p3, logp1-logp3
#ps=2 find z1,z2,z3, find p1,p2,p3=1-p1-p2 logp1-logp3
#ps=3 find z1,z2 staicu find z1hat z2hat
#ps=4 find z1,z2 staicu find z1hat z2hat but only use numerator
#k  #number of eigen functions
#q  #level of the categorical level
# datapoints=dim(X_i1)[2]
# n=dim(X_i1)[1]

#datapoints=dim(X_i1f)[2]
# n=dim(X_i1_15m)[1]
# # st=as.numeric(colnames(X_i1))[1]
# st=as.numeric(colnames(X_i1))[1]
# # et=tail(as.numeric(colnames(X_i1)),n=1)
# et=tail(as.numeric(colnames(X_i1f)),n=1)
# t=as.numeric(colnames(X_i1f))
get_estimate_latent=function(X_i1,X_i2,X_i3,ps,k,t){
  
  k=k
  
  #k=3  #number of eigen functions
  q=3  #level of the categorical level
  # n=10 #number of subjects
  
  
  ##############################
  
  # #recover Z_i1 hat using Z_i[1,all j, all n] only related to p1. n*t
  p1hat=probc(X_i1,t)
  #recover Z_i2 hat using X_i[2,all j, all n] only related to p2
  p2hat=probc(X_i2,t)
  p3hat=probc(X_i3,t)
  

  if(ps==1){ 
  
    Z_i1hatstar=log(p1hat)-log(p3hat)
    Z_i2hatstar=log(p2hat)-log(p3hat)
    
    
  }
  
 p_i1hat=p1hat
  p_i2hat=p2hat
  p_i3hat=p3hat
  

  
  # truel=list("Truecatcurve"=X_nt)
  est=list("EstimateZ_i1"=Z_i1hatstar,"EstimateZ_i2"=Z_i2hatstar,"Estimatep_i1"=p_i1hat,"Estimatep_i2"=p_i2hat,"Estimatep_i3"=p_i3hat)
  # return(list("Trueth"=truel,"Est"=est))
  return(list("Est"=est))
}



##ramsay
baysglm_resultram=function(datagenerated,M,datapoints,q=3,n,st,et,t){
  datapoints=datapoints
  # t=seq(from = st,to = et, length=datapoints)
  t=t
  st=st
  et=et
  Z_i1hatstar=datagenerated$Est$EstimateZ_i1
  Z_i2hatstar=datagenerated$Est$EstimateZ_i2
  n=dim(Z_i1hatstar)[1]
  Zihatstar=array(c(Z_i1hatstar, Z_i2hatstar), c(n,datapoints,2))

  fdarange = c(st, et)
  fdabasis = fda::create.bspline.basis(fdarange, 25, 4)
  fdatime = seq(st, et, length = datapoints)
  Zihatstarnew = apply(Zihatstar, c(1, 3), t)
  fdafd = fda::smooth.basis(fdatime, Zihatstarnew, fdabasis)$fd
  nharm = M
  fdapcaList = fda::pca.fd(fdafd, nharm)
  
  finalM=which(cumsum(fdapcaList$values)/sum(fdapcaList$values)>=0.95)[1]
  fdapcaListfinal = fda::pca.fd(fdafd, finalM)
  scores_z = apply(fdapcaListfinal$scores, c(1, 2), sum)
  values=fdapcaListfinal$values
  meanfn=fdapcaList$meanfd
  eigenfn=fdapcaList$harmonics
  
  dims=dim(scores_z)[2]
  if (dims<2){
    #finalM=which(cumsum(fdapcaList$values)/sum(fdapcaList$values)>=0.98)[1]
    finalM=2
    fdapcaListfinal = fda::pca.fd(fdafd, finalM)
    scores_z = apply(fdapcaListfinal$scores, c(1, 2), sum)
    values=fdapcaListfinal$values
    meanfn=fdapcaList$meanfd
    eigenfn=fdapcaList$harmonics
  }
  
  ##############FADP cluster
   Zihatone= Z_i1hatstar
  Zihattwo= Z_i2hatstar
  
  fdarange = c(st, et)
  fdabasis = fda::create.bspline.basis(fdarange, 25, 4)
  fdatime = seq(st, et, length = datapoints)
  fdafd1 = fda::smooth.basis(fdatime, t(Zihatone), fdabasis)$fd
  fdafd2 = fda::smooth.basis(fdatime, t(Zihattwo), fdabasis)$fd
  FADlist=list(fdafd1,fdafd2)
  FADP <- FADPclust(fdata = FADlist, cluster = 2:5, method = "FADP1",
                    proportion = seq(0.02, 0.2, 0.02), f.cut = 0.15,
                    pve = 0.9, stats = "Avg.silhouette")
  FADPcluster=FADP$clust
  
  ##################
  
  
  
  return(list("scores"=scores_z,
              "latentcurve"=Zihatstar,"eigenvalue"=values,"meanfn"=meanfn,
              "eigenfn"=eigenfn,"FADPcluster"=FADPcluster))
}

```


```{r}
st=Sys.time()
#trueestf=get_estimate_latent(as.matrix(X_i1f),as.matrix(X_i2f),as.matrix(X_i3f),1,3,t)
trueestffadp_15min=get_estimate_latent(as.matrix(X_i1_15m),as.matrix(X_i2_15m),as.matrix(X_i3_15m),1,3,t_15min)
et=Sys.time()
et-st #Time difference of 1.113632 hours
```


```{r}
st=Sys.time()
#mfpcaramffadp=baysglm_resultram(trueestf,2,2000,q=3,3875,t[1],t[2000],seq(t[1],t[2000],length=2000))
mfpcaramffadp_15min=baysglm_resultram(trueestffadp_15min,2,2000,q=3,3875,t_15min[1],t_15min[2000],t_15min)
#save(trueestf,mfpcaramf,file="Twitterramfinalfinal.RData")
save(trueestffadp_15min,mfpcaramffadp_15min,file="Twitterramfadp_15min.RData")
et=Sys.time()
et-st
```


```{r}
combinedscore_z=mfpcaramffadp_15min$scores #2D array you want to cluster
#combinedscore_z=mfpcahapf$MFPCAZ$scoresZ
dimz=dim(combinedscore_z)[2] #find how many features data has
if (dimz<=2){minPts=4} #this is what user defined. if you could automatically find a good one.that might solve all my problem. nOW I use default value from literature minPts=4 for 2 features and 2*features+1 for data has more than 2 features
if (dimz>2){minPts=2*dimz+1}
library(dbscan)
library(fossil)
#devtools::install_github("ahasverus/elbow")
library(elbow) #this library automatically select best epsilon
library(pdfCluster)
dist=kNNdist(combinedscore_z, k =minPts-1) #step 1 sort the distance. input 2D array you want to cluster, and then minPts-1
#ninty5p=quantile(dist, probs = pct)
scaleep=12.84  #this set to be 1, that is the scale you multiple the optimal epsilon, I set it to 12.84 just because of my twitter data is very noisy. this is the how much you want to multiple the optimal radius. increase the circle basically. instead of the optimal epsilon circle. I increase the circle so my cluster is meaingful otherwise if smalla circle, too many clusters are created
#########change to max increase
distdataelbow=data.frame(sort(dist)) #sort the distance
distdataelbow$index=1:(dim(combinedscore_z)[1])
ipoint <- elbow(data = distdataelbow)
epsoptimal=(ipoint$sort.dist._selected)*scaleep #these three lines find the elbow 
#epsoptimal=sortdist[which.max(diff(sortdist))]

##############################

#res <- dbscan(combinedscore_z, eps =ninty5p , minPts = minPts) minPts = 5
res <- dbscan(combinedscore_z, eps =epsoptimal , minPts = 25) #then use epsilon, minPts to cluster

#res <- dbscan(combinedscore_z, eps =ninty5p, minPts = 5)
table(res$cluster)

```


```{r}
tclusterdata=data.frame(combinedscore_z)
tclusterdata$Cluster=as.factor(res$cluster)
library(ggplot2)
tps <- ggplot(tclusterdata,aes(X1,X2,colour = Cluster)) + geom_point(aes(shape=Cluster),size=3)+ggtitle(paste0("Twitter Users Cluster Results",'\n',"(",dim(tclusterdata)[1]," Subjects",")")) +
  #xlab(expression('Score '* widehat(xi[i1]))) + ylab(expression('Score '* widehat(xi[i2])))
  xlab('MFPCA Score1 ') + ylab('MFPCA Score2 ')+ theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+#theme(text = element_text(size = 20))+
  #theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 30))  
  #theme(axis.text=element_text(size = 20),axis.title = element_text(size =30))
  theme(text=element_text(size = 20))+theme(legend.position = c(0.92,0.8))
```

```{r}
X_i2_full <- load("/Users/xzhao17/Documents/GitHub/xc_cj_clustering_cfd/R/submission_code/X_i2full.RData")
X_i3_full <- load("/Users/xzhao17/Documents/GitHub/xc_cj_clustering_cfd/R/submission_code/X_i3full.RData")

tweet_no_mention_data <- X_i2f
tweet_mention_data <- X_i3f
```

```{r}
# Combine into a 3D array

#unique(unname(W_matrix))

```


#
```{r}
# set.seed(123)
# data <- matrix(sample(0:1, 150, replace = TRUE), nrow = 5, ncol = 30)  # Replace this with your actual data
#bin every three time points and find the probability
# Function to calculate the sum of non-overlapping triplets along axis 1 for each row
calculate_non_overlapping_triplet_sums <- function(data) {
  n_rows <- nrow(data)
  n_cols <- ncol(data)
  
  # Check if there are at least three columns for triplet calculation
  if (n_cols < 3) {
    stop("The data must have at least three timesteps for triplet calculations.")
  }
  
  # Calculate the number of non-overlapping triplets in the data
  num_triplets <- n_cols %/% 3
  
  # Initialize a matrix to store results for each row
  triplet_sums <- matrix(NA, nrow = n_rows, ncol = num_triplets)
  
  # Loop through each row
  for (i in 1:n_rows) {
    for (j in 1:num_triplets) {
      start_col <- (j - 1) * 3 + 1  # Calculate the start column for the current triplet
      triplet_sums[i, j] <- sum(data[i, start_col:(start_col + 2)])
    }
  }
  
  return(triplet_sums)
}

# Calculate the non-overlapping triplet sums for the data
# triplet_sums <- calculate_non_overlapping_triplet_sums(data)
# triplet_sums
```


```{r}
#2000/3=666.6. 666*3=1998
# triplet_sums_no_tweet <- calculate_non_overlapping_triplet_sums(no_tweet_data[-c(indiv_one_cat,index_exclude),1:1998])
# triplet_sums_no_mention <- calculate_non_overlapping_triplet_sums(tweet_no_mention_data[-c(indiv_one_cat,index_exclude),1:1998])
# triplet_sums_mention <- calculate_non_overlapping_triplet_sums(tweet_mention_data[-c(indiv_one_cat,index_exclude),1:1998])


triplet_sums_no_tweet <- calculate_non_overlapping_triplet_sums(no_tweet_data[,1:1998])
triplet_sums_no_mention <- calculate_non_overlapping_triplet_sums(tweet_no_mention_data[,1:1998])
triplet_sums_mention <- calculate_non_overlapping_triplet_sums(tweet_mention_data[,1:1998])
```

```{r}
save(triplet_sums_no_tweet,triplet_sums_no_mention, triplet_sums_mention , file = "triplet_sum_over_time.RData")
```



#find probability
```{r}
# Now we want to calculate probablity based on the column (probablity for whole population at that timestep-triplet) 
# unique_categories <- sort(unique(array(triplet_sums)))
unique_categories <- c(0,1,2,3)

# Function to calculate the fraction of times each integer in the given set appears in the vector
calculate_fraction <- function(vector, given_set) {
  total_length <- length(vector)
  
  # Calculate the fraction for each integer in the given set
  fractions <- sapply(given_set, function(x) {
    #sum(vector == x) / total_length
     sum(vector == x) 
  })
  
  # Create a named vector for clarity
  names(fractions) <- paste0("(Sum=", given_set, ")")
  
  return(fractions)
}

```

```{r}
# lets apply it over the rows
triplet_prob_no_tweet <- apply(triplet_sums_no_tweet, 1, function(x){calculate_fraction(x, unique_categories)})
print(triplet_prob_no_tweet[,1:10])


triplet_prob_no_mention <- apply(triplet_sums_no_mention, 1, function(x){calculate_fraction(x, unique_categories)})
print(triplet_prob_no_mention[,1:10])

triplet_prob_mention <- apply(triplet_sums_mention, 1, function(x){calculate_fraction(x, unique_categories)})
print(triplet_prob_mention[,1:10])
```

```{r}
save(triplet_sums_no_tweet, triplet_sums_no_mention, triplet_sums_mention,
     triplet_prob_no_tweet , triplet_prob_no_mention, triplet_prob_mention, file="Triplet__Count_O.RData")
```


```{r}
load("Triplet.RData")
```



#
```{r}
#estimate z and p
source("/Users/xzhao17/Documents/GitHub/xc_cj_clustering_cfd/R/acj/gam_weekends.R")
num_indv <- 3875
timestamps01 <- as.numeric(noquote(colnames(no_tweet_data)))[1:1000]
basis_size <- 25 
#timeseries_length <- length(timestamps01)
timeseries_length <- 1000
method <- "REML"
source("/Users/xzhao17/Documents/GitHub/xc_cj_clustering_cfd/R/acj/gam_weekends.R")
source("/Users/xzhao17/Documents/GitHub/xc_cj_clustering_cfd/R/acj/time_track_function.R")
 timeKeeperStart("Xiaoxia")
 zp <- foreach (indv = 1:num_indv, .combine = cbind, .init = NULL, .packages = c("mgcv")) %dorng%
    {
      source("/Users/xzhao17/Documents/GitHub/xc_cj_clustering_cfd/R/acj/gam_weekends.R")

      
      # x1<- X[indv,,1]
      # x2<- X[indv,,2]
      # x3<- X[indv,,3]
      
      # x1 <- no_tweet_data[indv,]
      # x2 <- tweet_no_mention_data[indv,]
      # x3 <- tweet_mention_data[indv,]
      #15 minutes, one day 24 hours is 96 data points, 5 days is 480 data points, two weekends days are 192 data points
      # one week is 480+192 = 672 data points
      #two week is 1344 data points
      # three week is 2016 data points
      #four week is 2688 data points
      #maximum 2000 data points is 286 weeks
      #weekend_vector <- c(rep(c(rep(0,480),rep(1,192)),4))[1:length(x1)]
      
      weekend_vector <- c(rep(c(rep(0,480),rep(1,192)),4))[96:(96+length(no_tweet_data)-1)][1:1000]
      gam_result_1 <- RunGam_Day(timestamps01,  weekend_vector, no_tweet_data[indv,1:1000], "binomial", basis_size, method)
      p1 <- gam_result_1$prob
      p1_linpred <- gam_result_1$linpred
      
      gam_result_2 <- RunGam_Day(timestamps01,  weekend_vector, tweet_no_mention_data[indv,1:1000], "binomial", basis_size, method)
      p2 <- gam_result_2$prob
      p2_linpred <- gam_result_2$linpred
      
      gam_result_3 <- RunGam_Day(timestamps01,  weekend_vector, tweet_mention_data[indv,1:1000], "binomial", basis_size, method)
      p3 <- gam_result_3$prob
      p3_linpred <- gam_result_3$linpred
      
      # estimate the latent tranjecotries Z
      denominator_p <- 1 + exp(p3_linpred)
      z1 <- (p1_linpred-p3_linpred)-log( (1+exp(p1_linpred))/(denominator_p))
      z2 <- (p2_linpred-p3_linpred)-log( (1+exp(p2_linpred))/(denominator_p))
      
      #psum <- p1 + p2 + p3
      #return(c(c(z1,z2), cbind(p1/psum, p2/psum, p3/psum)))
      return(c(c(z1,z2), cbind(p1/(p1 + p2 + p3), p2/(p1 + p2 + p3), p3/(p1 + p2 + p3))))
    }
  # Unravel the two variables from zp
  z_rows_count <- timeseries_length * 2
  Z <- array(zp[1:z_rows_count, ], c(z_rows_count, num_indv))
  p <- array(t(matrix(zp[(z_rows_count + 1):dim(zp)[1], ], ncol=num_indv)), c(num_indv, timeseries_length, category_count))
timeKeeperNext()  
  Z1_est <- Z[1:timeseries_length,]
  Z2_est <- Z[1:timeseries_length+timeseries_length,]
  
  p1_est <- t(p[,,1])
  p2_est <- t(p[,,2])
  p3_est <- t(p[,,3])
```




```{r}
#1000
#save(Z1_est, Z2_est, p1_est, p2_est, p3_est, file = "Twitter_Est.RData")
save(Z1_est, Z2_est, p1_est, p2_est, p3_est, file = "Twitter_Est_1000.RData")
```

```{r}
load("/Users/xzhao17/Documents/GitHub/xc_cj_clustering_cfd/R/acj/Twitter_ZP__WeekendCoeff_Final_Unique_Time_P.RData")
```

```{r}
dim(Twitter_ZP__WeekendCoeff_Final_Unique_Time_P$p1_est)
```


```{r}
#bin every three time points and find the probability
# Function to calculate the sum of non-overlapping triplets along axis 1 for each row
calculate_non_overlapping_triplet_prob <- function(data) {
  n_rows <- nrow(data)
  n_cols <- ncol(data)
  
  # Check if there are at least three columns for triplet calculation
  if (n_cols < 3) {
    stop("The data must have at least three timesteps for triplet calculations.")
  }
  
  # Calculate the number of non-overlapping triplets in the data
  num_triplets <- n_cols %/% 3
  
  # Initialize a matrix to store results for each row
  #triplet_prob_array <- array(0, c(n_rows, num_triplets, 4))
  
  triplet_prob_zero <- matrix(NA, nrow = n_rows, ncol = num_triplets)
  triplet_prob_one <- matrix(NA, nrow = n_rows, ncol = num_triplets)
  triplet_prob_two <- matrix(NA, nrow = n_rows, ncol = num_triplets)
  triplet_prob_three <- matrix(NA, nrow = n_rows, ncol = num_triplets)
  
  # Loop through each row
  for (i in 1:n_rows) {
    for (j in 1:num_triplets) {
      start_col <- (j - 1) * 3 + 1  # Calculate the start column for the current triplet
      triplet_prob_zero[i, j] <- (1 - data[i, start_col])*(1 - data[i,(start_col + 1)])*(1 - data[i, (start_col + 2)])
       triplet_prob_one[i, j] <- (1 - data[i, start_col])*( data[i,(start_col + 1)])*(1 - data[i, (start_col+ 2)])+(1 - data[i, start_col])*(1 - data[i,(start_col + 1)])*( data[i, (start_col + 2)])+
                                 ( data[i, start_col])*(1 - data[i,(start_col + 1)])*(1 - data[i, (start_col + 2)])
      triplet_prob_two[i, j] <- (1 - data[i, start_col])*( data[i,(start_col + 1)])*( data[i, (start_col + 2)])+
        ( data[i, start_col])*(1 - data[i,(start_col + 1)])*( data[i, (start_col + 2)])+
        ( data[i, start_col])*( data[i,(start_col + 1)])*(1 - data[i, (start_col + 2)])
      triplet_prob_three[i, j] <- ( data[i, start_col])*( data[i,(start_col + 1)])*( data[i, (start_col + 2)])
      
    }
  }
   # triplet_prob_array [,,1] <- triplet_prob_zero
   # triplet_prob_array [,,2] <- triplet_prob_one
   # triplet_prob_array [,,3] <- triplet_prob_two
   # triplet_prob_array [,,4] <- triplet_prob_three
   # triplet_prob_final <- rbind(rowSums(triplet_prob_zero), rowSums(triplet_prob_one),
   #                             rowSums(triplet_prob_two), rowSums(triplet_prob_three))
   
    # triplet_prob_final <- rbind(0*rowSums(triplet_prob_zero)/num_triplets, 1*rowSums(triplet_prob_one)/num_triplets,
    #                           2* rowSums(triplet_prob_two)/num_triplets, 3*rowSums(triplet_prob_three)/num_triplets)
    triplet_prob_final <- rbind(0*rowSums(triplet_prob_zero), 1*rowSums(triplet_prob_one)/num_triplets,
                               rowSums(triplet_prob_two)*num_triplets, rowSums(triplet_prob_three)*num_triplets)
   rownames( triplet_prob_final) <- c ("Sum = 0", "Sum = 1" ,"Sum = 2", "Sum = 3")
  return(triplet_prob_final)
}
```


```{r}
chi_square_no_tweet <- calculate_non_overlapping_triplet_prob (trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i1)

# chi_square_no_tweet <- calculate_non_overlapping_triplet_prob (t(p1_est))
```

```{r}
chi_square_no_mention <- calculate_non_overlapping_triplet_prob (trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i2)
#chi_square_no_mention <- calculate_non_overlapping_triplet_prob (t(p2_est))
```


```{r}
 chi_square_mention <- calculate_non_overlapping_triplet_prob (trueestf$Est$Estimatep_i3)

#chi_square_mention <- calculate_non_overlapping_triplet_prob (t(p3_est))
```

```{r}
# save(chi_square_no_tweet, chi_square_no_mention, chi_square_mention, file = "est_triplet_count.RData")

# save(chi_square_no_tweet, chi_square_no_mention, chi_square_mention, file = "est_triplet_count_nodivision.RData")

save(chi_square_no_tweet, chi_square_no_mention, chi_square_mention, file = "est_triplet_count_multiply.RData")
```


#find the chi square test statistic
```{r}
n_cols <- ncol(triplet_prob_no_tweet)
 num_triplets <- n_cols %/% 3

  # no_tweet_p_value <- num_triplets*apply((triplet_prob_no_tweet - chi_square_no_tweet)^2/chi_square_no_tweet,2, sum)
  # no_mention_p_value <- num_triplets*apply((triplet_prob_no_mention - chi_square_no_mention)^2/chi_square_no_mention,2, sum)
  # mention_p_value <- num_triplets*apply((triplet_prob_mention - chi_square_mention)^2/chi_square_mention,2, sum)
  # 
  no_tweet_p_value <- apply((triplet_prob_no_tweet - chi_square_no_tweet)^2/chi_square_no_tweet,2, sum)
  no_mention_p_value <- apply((triplet_prob_no_mention - chi_square_no_mention)^2/chi_square_no_mention,2, sum)
  mention_p_value <-apply((triplet_prob_mention - chi_square_mention)^2/chi_square_mention,2, sum)
```

#use estimate from gam weekends
```{r}
chi_square_no_tweet <- calculate_non_overlapping_triplet_prob (t(p1_est))
chi_square_no_mention <- calculate_non_overlapping_triplet_prob (t(p2_est))
chi_square_mention <- calculate_non_overlapping_triplet_prob (t(p3_est))

n_cols <- ncol(triplet_prob_no_tweet)
 num_triplets <- n_cols %/% 3

  no_tweet_p_value <- num_triplets*apply((triplet_prob_no_tweet - chi_square_no_tweet)^2/chi_square_no_tweet,2, sum)
  no_mention_p_value <- num_triplets*apply((triplet_prob_no_mention - chi_square_no_mention)^2/chi_square_no_mention,2, sum)
  mention_p_value <- num_triplets*apply((triplet_prob_mention - chi_square_mention)^2/chi_square_mention,2, sum)

  
  num_indv <- dim(p1_est)[2]
length(which(pchisq(q = no_tweet_p_value, df = 3, lower.tail = FALSE)<0.05))/num_indv

length(which(pchisq(q = no_mention_p_value , df = 3, lower.tail = FALSE)<0.05))/num_indv

length(which(pchisq(q = mention_p_value, df = 3, lower.tail = FALSE)<0.05))/num_indv
```





```{r}
save (chi_square_no_tweet, chi_square_no_mention, chi_square_mention,
      no_tweet_p_value,no_mention_p_value, mention_p_value, file = "chiq_square_est.RData")
```


```{r}
load("chiq_square_est.RData")
```


#find the p value
```{r}
length(which(pchisq(q = no_tweet_p_value, df = 3, lower.tail = FALSE)<0.05))
length(which(pchisq(q = no_mention_p_value , df = 3, lower.tail = FALSE)<0.05))
length(which(pchisq(q = mention_p_value, df = 3, lower.tail = FALSE)<0.05))
```

<!-- [1] 2326 -->
<!-- [1] 2268 -->
<!-- [1] 93 -->

```{r}
critical_chi <- qchisq(0.05,3,lower.tail = FALSE)
```

```{r}
mean(mention_p_value > critical_chi)
```

```{r}
num_indv <- dim(chi_square_no_tweet)[2]
length(which(pchisq(q = no_tweet_p_value, df = 3, lower.tail = FALSE)<0.05))/num_indv

length(which(pchisq(q = no_mention_p_value , df = 3, lower.tail = FALSE)<0.05))/num_indv

length(which(pchisq(q = mention_p_value, df = 3, lower.tail = FALSE)<0.05))/num_indv
```



```{r}
num_indv <- dim(chi_square_no_tweet)[2]
length(which(pchisq(q = no_tweet_p_value, df = 3, lower.tail = FALSE)<0.05))/num_indv

length(which(pchisq(q = no_mention_p_value , df = 3, lower.tail = FALSE)<0.05))/num_indv

length(which(pchisq(q = mention_p_value, df = 3, lower.tail = FALSE)<0.05))/num_indv
```




```{r}
num_indv <- dim(chi_square_no_tweet)[2]
length(which(pchisq(q = no_tweet_p_value, df = 3, lower.tail = FALSE)<0.05))/num_indv

length(which(pchisq(q = no_mention_p_value , df = 3, lower.tail = FALSE)<0.05))/num_indv

length(which(pchisq(q = mention_p_value, df = 3, lower.tail = FALSE)<0.05))/num_indv
```

<!-- [1] 0.6002581 -->
<!-- [1] 0.5852903 -->
<!-- [1] 0.024 -->


```{r}
par(mfrow= c(1,3))
plot(1:num_indv,pchisq(q = no_tweet_p_value, df = 3, lower.tail = FALSE), main = "No Tweet", xlab = "Individual", ylab = "Probability",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2)
abline(h = 0.05, col = "red", lwd = 2)
plot(1:num_indv,pchisq(q = no_mention_p_value, df = 3, lower.tail = FALSE), main = "No Mention", xlab = "Individual", ylab = "Probability",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2)
abline(h = 0.05, col = "red", lwd = 2)
plot(1:num_indv,pchisq(q = mention_p_value, df = 3, lower.tail = FALSE), main = "Mention", xlab = "Individual", ylab = "Probability",cex.lab = 1.5,cex.axis = 2,cex.main=2)
abline(h = 0.05, col = "red", lwd = 2)

```
```{r}
#simulation
eigen_score <- extract_scores_UNIVFPCA (t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1),t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2), timestamps01 , PVE=0.95)
```
```{r}
par(mfrow = c(1,2))
matplot(timestamps01,t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1),type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
        xlab = "Time", ylab = "Value", main = "Z1")
#recover
library(MASS)
#n *4000
Z_after <-  t(sqrt(length(timestamps01))*eigen_score $scores%*%ginv(eigen_score$Phi))
matlines(timestamps01,Z_after[1:2000,],type='l', lty=1, col="light blue")


matplot(timestamps01,t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2),type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
        xlab = "Time", ylab = "Value", main = "Z2")
#recover
matlines(timestamps01,Z_after[2001:4000,],type='l', lty=1, col="light blue")
```
```{r}
par(mfrow = c(1,2))
matplot(timestamps01,t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i1)-Z_after[1:2000,],type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
        xlab = "Time", ylab = "Value", main = "Z1")
#recover

matplot(timestamps01,t(trueestf$Est$EstimateZ_i2)-Z_after[2001:4000,],type='l', lty=1, col="light grey",
        xlab = "Time", ylab = "Value", main = "Z2")

```
